source_metadata.source_name: Welsh Curriculum for Wales Health & Wellbeing AoLE
source_metadata.skill_run_notes: All KUD items derive from the Welsh CfW 'Statements of what matters' document, which is a cross-Progression-Step framework with no per-item PS label. The canonical PS→REAL band mapping table was not applicable on a per-item basis. All items default to the full PS1–PS5 span (Bands A–E, ages 3–16, low confidence), except blk_0018_item_01 (career pathway content), which was narrowed to Bands D–E by content inference (band_confidence medium). source_voice_preserved is true on all 33 KUD items and all 20 LTs.

band_tagged_kud.content_statement: Developing physical health and well-being has lifelong benefits.
band_tagged_kud.band_rationale: Source is a cross-Progression-Step 'Statements of what matters' document with no per-item PS label; defaults to full PS1–PS5 span (Bands A–E, ages 3–16).

band_tagged_kud.content_statement: Care for and respect themselves and others as a sustained default orientation across contexts.
band_tagged_kud.band_rationale: Source is a cross-Progression-Step 'Statements of what matters' document with no per-item PS label; defaults to full PS1–PS5 span (Bands A–E, ages 3–16).

band_tagged_kud.content_statement: Positive, informed behaviours that care for and respect self and others support learners' sense of self-worth, their overall mood and energy levels.
band_tagged_kud.band_rationale: Source is a cross-Progression-Step 'Statements of what matters' document with no per-item PS label; defaults to full PS1–PS5 span (Bands A–E, ages 3–16).

band_tagged_kud.content_statement: Knowledge and understanding of factors that support physical health and well-being, including the relationship between physical activity, nutrition, sleep, and overall health outcomes.

band_tagged_kud.content_statement: Recognise that feelings and emotions are neither fixed nor consistent, and hold this recognition as a sustained orientation across contexts and over time.

band_tagged_kud.band_rationale: Source is a cross-Progression-Step 'Statements of what matters' document with no per-item PS label; defaults to full PS1–PS5 span (Bands A–E, ages 3–16).

band_tagged_kud.content_statement: Sustain a default orientation toward normalising talk about mental health and emotional well-being across peer interactions and community contexts.

band_tagged_kud.content_statement: How decisions and actions impact on themselves, on others and on wider society, both now and in the future

band_tagged_kud.content_statement: The factors that influence decision-making

band_tagged_kud.content_statement: Career pathway decisions have significant lifelong consequences for learners.

band_tagged_kud.content_statement: How we engage with social influences shapes who we are and affects our health and well-being.

skill_flags: cross_ps_flat_framework: All 33 KUD items derive from the Welsh CfW 'Statements of what matters' document, which spans all five Progression Steps without per-item PS labels. The canonical PS→REAL band mapping table (PS1→Band A, PS2→Bands B/C, etc.) could not be applied on a per-item basis because no source_block→PS mapping exists in this corpus. All items defaulted to the full PS1–PS5 span (Bands A–E, low confidence). This is a structural characteristic of 'Statements of what matters' documents — they define overarching content for the whole age range, not per-PS content. To apply the canonical mapping, the Welsh CfW achievement outcomes documents (one per Progression Step) would be needed as a separate source. This is not a quality failure of the skill; it is an honest report of the source's structure.

high_ambiguity_rate_structural: 97% of KUD items (32/33) span Bands A–E (low confidence) because the source is a cross-Progression-Step framework. One item (blk_0018_item_01, career pathway content) was narrowed to Bands D–E by content inference. This high ambiguity rate is expected for this source type and does not indicate a quality failure; REAL teacher review using the Welsh CfW per-PS achievement outcomes is needed to assign narrower band tags.

content_inference_applied_to_one_item: blk_0018_item_01 ('Career pathway decisions have significant lifelong consequences for learners') was narrowed from A–E to D–E by content inference only (career content is characteristic of CfW PS4/PS5, ages 11–16). No source label supports this narrowing; teacher review is recommended to confirm.
